MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-25-2011 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 301

DISCOVERY 301, PLAINTIFF LARAMAR URBAN SPECIALTY PARTNERS' MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. SANCTIONS OF $275.00 WAS AWARDED BY THE COURT. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, NOT REPORTED.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF FIRM NAME FILED BY ATTORNEY DOWLING, CURTIS F
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT
